description:
Advances: specled.tagged_tests

Deliverable:
Full detail: refined plan Stage 2 (mini-plan think-t2d run 20260702-071642) + ADR specled.decision.evidence_based_attribution (AUTHORED AT DISTILL — reference it from the spec's decisions: list; extend its Consequences only if implementation reveals a gap). Depends on S1 (specled_-0y8.1). This is the governance-heavy stage: append_only runs at error, so the requirement REWRITE/REVISIONS must land in the same commit as their co-changed scenarios, tests, and realizing code. Deliberately unsplit.

Code:
- NEW lib/specled_ex/tagged_tests/formatter.ex — SpecLedEx.TaggedTests.Formatter, ExUnit formatter GenServer (model: SpecLedEx.Coverage.Formatter; @impl GenServer never @impl true). init/1 reads SPECLED_ATTRIBUTION_PATH env var (:artifact_path init opt overrides for unit tests); unset/blank -> {:ok, :disabled}, all handlers no-op. test_started/test_finished: one JSONL line each ONLY for tests with tags[:spec] present (normalize string-or-list to list). Fields: event, id (inspect(module).name), file, line, spec (list), and state for test_finished in pass|failed|invalid|skipped|excluded (ExUnit.Test.state nil -> pass). suite_finished -> {"event":"suite_finished"}. Line-flushed: one File.write!(path, line <> newline, [:append]) per event — no open handle, no :delayed_write. JSON via SpecLedEx.Json.
- NEW lib/specled_ex/tagged_tests/attribution.ex — SpecLedEx.TaggedTests.Attribution: read_artifact/1 -> {:ok, events} | :absent (missing/unreadable/zero parseable lines; tolerate trailing partial line). attribute(events, cover_ids) -> map of cover_id => :passed | {:failed, [test_ids]} | {:in_flight, [test_ids]} (a SET — max_cases > 1) | :not_started (no events AND no suite_finished) | :not_executed (no pass/fail evidence but suite_finished present, incl. skipped/excluded-only). suite_finished?/1 helper — the red-run discriminator.
- lib/specled_ex/tagged_tests.ex build_command/2: append --formatter SpecLedEx.TaggedTests.Formatter --formatter ExUnit.CLIFormatter after --include integration, before file args (any --formatter replaces ExUnit's default set, so CLIFormatter must be re-listed). Arity stays /2; existing prefix/unique-files/flag-order requirements stay true.
- lib/specled_ex/verifier.ex: run_command/3 grows optional opts (:env) passed to Port.open {:env, ...}; merged_tagged_tests_results/4 mints tmp artifact path (specled_attr_<unique>.jsonl), sets SPECLED_ATTRIBUTION_PATH, runs, reads via Attribution.read_artifact/1, deletes artifact. Distribution point (~1847): each entry's result carries :attribution (per-cover outcome map restricted to that entry's covers) alongside shared output/exit_code/command/timeout fact. Artifact :absent -> no :attribution key -> every downstream branch takes today's path unchanged (DEGRADATION CONTRACT — byte-for-byte). tagged_tests_executed?/4 (~2042): with attribution, executed <=> cover outcome :passed; without, today's exit_code == 0. Finding emission (append_command_runtime_finding ~391, checks builder ~1042): with attribution on a red run, only {:failed, tests} covers get verification_command_failed (message names failing tests); verification_command_timeout findings (s65.7) name {:in_flight} hang suspects ('timed out while running test/foo_test.exs:42') and count the :not_started remainder; artifact with zero events on timeout -> 'timed out before any test started — likely compile cost'. NEW warning finding tagged_tests_cover_not_executed for :not_executed (mind specled.decision.finding_code_budget conventions).

Spec (same commit as code+tests):
- .spec/specs/tagged_tests_verification.spec.md: REWRITE specled.tagged_tests.merged_run_attribution (run at most once per report; artifact readable -> per-cover-id observed outcomes distributed; absent -> shared run outcome, today's behavior). REVISE strength_progression + strength_executed_on_green_run (executed = per-claim evidence with artifact present; aggregated exit zero when absent). NEW requirements each with scenario + @tag spec: test (test_tags at error): build_command_appends_formatters; formatter_streams_jsonl; formatter_noop_without_artifact_path; attribution_partial_outcomes (incl. hang-suspect SET + timeout-remainder vs runtime-excluded policy); attribution_degrades_to_shared_fate; cover_not_executed_finding; timeout_names_hang_suspects (incl. empty-artifact compile-cost message). Update scenario merged_run_executes_once_across_subjects only if its 'same execution outcome' phrasing no longer holds. Extend surface: and realized_by: with new modules; append new cover ids to the tagged_tests verification block; add specled.decision.evidence_based_attribution to spec-meta decisions:.
- Regenerate .spec/state.json.

Verification:
- Tests to pass: test/specled_ex/tagged_tests_test.exs (build_command formatter flags); NEW test/specled_ex/tagged_tests/formatter_test.exs (drive GenServer with synthetic %ExUnit.Test{} casts, assert JSONL; noop-without-path); NEW test/specled_ex/tagged_tests/attribution_test.exs (pure data-in/data-out classification matrix); test/specled_ex/verifier_test.exs (degradation to shared fate; cover_not_executed finding; timeout names hang suspects via fake artifact at env-var path + shim mix pattern from scenario.merged_run_executes_once_across_subjects); NEW test/integration/tagged_tests_attribution_test.exs (scaffold tmp fixture project per test_support/specled_ex_integration_case.ex ERL_LIBS + SPECLED_EX_EBIN; run mix test with both formatter flags + SPECLED_ATTRIBUTION_PATH; assert started/finished/suite_finished lines for a spec-tagged test; @tag :integration + @tag spec: formatter_streams_jsonl).
- Behaviors to demonstrate: all scenarios authored in this stage.
- Commands: mix compile --warnings-as-errors && mix test && mix format --check-formatted && mix deps.unlock --check-unused && mix spec.check

Allowed touches (this stage may modify):
- lib/specled_ex/tagged_tests.ex
- lib/specled_ex/tagged_tests/**
- lib/specled_ex/verifier.ex
- test/specled_ex/tagged_tests_test.exs
- test/specled_ex/tagged_tests/**
- test/specled_ex/verifier_test.exs
- test/integration/tagged_tests_attribution_test.exs
- .spec/specs/tagged_tests_verification.spec.md
- .spec/decisions/specled.decision.evidence_based_attribution.md
- .spec/state.json

Out of Scope (files):
- lib/mix/tasks/**
- .spec/specs/verification.spec.md
- .spec/config.yml
- test/fixtures/**

Out of Scope (intent):
- No resume/second run (S3). No retry, no artifact persistence beyond the verify call.
- No change to kind: command per-spec execution semantics (env plumbing in run_command stays inert for that path — no env var set, no artifact).
- No tag scanner / test-tag index changes; no new strength levels (claimed < linked < executed stays).
- Formatter records spec-tagged tests only — do not attribute untagged tests sharing a file.
- Degradation contract is non-negotiable: artifact absent -> today's shared-fate behavior exactly.
- Conventions: @impl GenServer never @impl true; to_timeout/1 not :timer; escape interpolation in doc strings.

Merge gate:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly (mix compile --warnings-as-errors)
- [ ] Tests listed above pass
- [ ] Spec verification passes (mix spec.check)
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs (mechanical)
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket
title: S2: Streaming formatter + evidence-based per-cover attribution
